chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Acq. Appeal No. S – 170 of 2022 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge For hearing of case 1. For orders on office objections at Flag-A 2. For hearing of main case 29.01.2024 Mr. Aftab Ahmed Shar, Additional Prosecutor General..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- None present for the appellant. No intimation is received. Same was the position on the last date of hearing. Therefore, this acquittal appeal is dismissed in non-prosecution. J U D G E Abdul Basit
